query:
SELECT rqm.mapping_id, rqm.question_text_clean, cr.canonical_description, cr.requirement_type
FROM requirement_question_mapping rqm
JOIN canonical_requirements cr ON rqm.canonical_id = cr.canonical_id
WHERE rqm.mapping_id = 'MAP-06581AC3';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 7QDB1rdZo1Phrn3.bcf291fc06f4 --database A6U3GSLMGWuR2P4b85Hiyy --execute SELECT rqm.mapping_id, rqm.question_text_clean, cr.canonical_description, cr.requirement_type
FROM requirement_question_mapping rqm
JOIN canonical_requirements cr ON rqm.canonical_id = cr.canonical_id
WHERE rqm.mapping_id = 'MAP-06581AC3';

rows.question_text_clean: A empresa cumpre o seguinte requisito: I - o local constante do cadastro com identificação única de que trata o desta Lei Complementar, que deve considerar:?
rows.canonical_description: Contribuinte deve i - o local constante do cadastro com identificação única de que trata o desta Lei Complementar, que deve considerar:.
